riskFactors: Smoking — significant cardiovascular and cancer risk
advice: Quitting smoking is the single most impactful change for long-term health. Seek support from a doctor.
Aim for 150 minutes of moderate exercise per week (e.g., 30 min brisk walk 5x/week).
recommendedScreenings: Annual blood pressure and cholesterol check
Blood sugar / HbA1c screening for diabetes
